name: @prune/skill-library
description: E4 — Cross-Session Typed Skill Library. Captures the INFLUENTIAL subset of a completed agent trajectory (from @prune/trajectory-diet's influence labels), fingerprints the task intent, and replays the typed skill on a matching future task — turning O(N) per-session discovery into O(1) reuse. Provenance-hashed via @prune/replay-vault; replay-guarded by caller-declared freshness preconditions; outcome-gated by @prune/equivalence. No regex, no model call, deterministic.
